content.content: TV show host who runs the website Boutique cuisine futée with Geneviève O'Gleman. She uses her Instagram under the name diaz_alex to show off her recipes and day to day life. She has over 40,000 followers on the platform. She became a marathon runner. She and Geneviève O'Gleman run a second Instagram called cuisinefutee. She was born in Santiago, Chile. She is a supporter ofBarack Obama.
